description: Informal note in Judaeo-Arabic. "R. Natan b. Shelomo ha-Kohen spoke with Rab[benu?] ha-Meʿulle, and he said to him, 'I heard that Abū l-Faraj al-Jub[aylī?] divorced his wife with a geṭ.' Inquire about this for me." Abū l-Faraj al-Jubaylī appears in several other documents from the mid-12th century.
description_he: פתק בלתי פורמלי ביהודית-ערבית: ר' נתן בן שלמה הכהן שמע שאבו אל-פרג' אל-ג'ובילי גירש את אשתו בגט ומבקש לברר זאת
